summary: Light meeting day with one anchor: Finance Update with Harold at 9:30 AM EDT covering full CTI Group financials (UNO, BARON, all divisions) inside Zoho Books. Tomorrow heats up — Executive Team weekly at 8:30 AM EDT and a rescheduled Carnival UK Talent Pool follow-up with Amelia Annunziata at 10:30 AM EDT. No Fireflies activity in the last 24 hours; Zoho J1 modules returned permission-denied or empty payloads — data pending.
